# 是 Ray 不是 Array (English)

> 👨‍💻 嗨！我是 Ray，一個不想被當成 Array 的軟體工程師。這裡匯集了我的技術筆記與實戰心得。我相信透過分享不僅能幫助他人，也能讓自己在軟體開發的路上更加堅定。

## About
- [Ray](https://israynotarray.com/en/about/): Software Engineer — author of 是 Ray 不是 Array

## BEVN Network (related properties owned by the same author)
- https://israynotarray.dev — Personal portal site
- https://tools.israynotarray.dev — Online utilities collection (100+ tools)
- https://labor.israynotarray.dev — Taiwan labor rights calculators
- https://gems.israynotarray.dev — AI gems collection
- https://skills.israynotarray.dev — AI agent skill generator
- https://line-analysis.israynotarray.dev — LINE sticker analysis tool
- https://calculator.israynotarray.dev — Calculator collection: 19 everyday life and finance calculators
